title: willoughbya strobilifera
intro: Willoughbya strobilifera, also known as the "Christmas fern" or "tree fern", is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Stemonuraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Willoughbya strobilifera include treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant are usually made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to ease pain and reduce inflammation.
